topStories.title: Bajaj Auto posts record quarterly profit of Rs 2,746 crore on volume surge
topStories.summary: Bajaj Auto achieved its highest-ever quarterly net profit of ₹2,746 crore. This record performance was fueled by strong vehicle sales across its brands. The company also saw significant growth in exports. Despite anticipating some industry slowdown, Bajaj Auto remains optimistic due to its strong product mix and export strength. The full-year results also set new records for revenue and profit.

topStories.title: US market today: Warner Bros Discovery's streaming growth accelerates on global HBO Max push
topStories.summary: Warner Bros. Discovery's streaming unit exceeded revenue expectations, driven by HBO Max's international expansion and subscriber growth. Despite a significant net loss attributed to a termination fee related to a merger with Paramount Skydance, the company is on track to surpass 150 million global subscribers this year, bolstering its competitive position against rivals.

topStories.title: US stocks today: S&P 500 and Nasdaq notch records; AMD results spark AI stock rally
topStories.summary: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq hit record highs Wednesday, fueled by Middle East conflict resolution hopes and strong AMD earnings boosting AI stocks. Global stocks surged as oil prices dropped, with S&P 500 companies showing robust profit growth driven by AI advancements.  The economy shows stability, with strong private payrolls and positive outlooks from companies like Disney and Uber.

Ted Turner and legacy of WCW: How he revolutionized wrestling, created nWo, and challenged Vince McMahon
india.summary: Ted Turner, the media mogul behind CNN, TNT, and TBS, has died at 87. He transformed professional wrestling by turning WCW into a national rival to WWF, launching Monday Nitro and the nWo era. Turner’s hands-off approach, cultural insight, and media empire permanently reshaped wrestling and television. He is survived by five children, 14 grandchildren, and two great-grandchildren.

india.title: JasonTheWeen, Marlon, StableRonaldo under fire for running red light and stop sign on stream
india.summary: Popular streamers JasonTheWeen, Marlon, and StableRonaldo are facing backlash after a clip showed them disregarding traffic laws on motorized two-wheelers. The video captured them running a red light and failing to fully stop at a stop sign, with viewers also noting the absence of helmets. This incident has ignited discussions about streamer accountability and road safety.

business.title: Bajaj Auto posts record quarterly profit of Rs 2,746 crore on volume surge
business.summary: Bajaj Auto achieved its highest-ever quarterly net profit of ₹2,746 crore. This record performance was fueled by strong vehicle sales across its brands. The company also saw significant growth in exports. Despite anticipating some industry slowdown, Bajaj Auto remains optimistic due to its strong product mix and export strength. The full-year results also set new records for revenue and profit.

business.title: US market today: Warner Bros Discovery's streaming growth accelerates on global HBO Max push

business.title: SpaceX IPO gives Elon Musk sweeping power, curbs shareholder rights

Despite these restrictions, many investors are expected to participate due to Musk's track record and the potential for high returns.
